explainer.title: What is a dummy ticket?
explainer.text: A dummy ticket is a temporary flight reservation with passenger details, route, dates, airline information, and a live booking reference. It helps you show travel intent without paying for a full ticket before your visa or travel plan is approved.

pnr.title: Live PNR
pnr.text: Use the booking reference to verify the reservation on the airline website.

format.title: Looks official
format.text: Clean PDF format with passenger, flight, route, and date details.

cost.title: Lower cost
cost.text: Avoid locking money into a full airfare before your decision is final.

accepted.title: Globally useful

useCases.text: Use a temporary reservation when you need to prove travel intent without committing to an expensive flight too early.

renewals.title: Extensions and renewals

legal.title: Is a dummy ticket legal?
legal.text: A dummy ticket is a real temporary reservation used as travel documentation. It is not a boarding pass and should not be used for airport check-in or actual travel.

illegal.truth: Truth: temporary reservations are widely used as proof of travel intent for visa and travel documentation.

fake.truth: Truth: a proper reservation includes a real booking reference and itinerary details.

rejected.truth: Truth: many visa processes ask for a reservation instead of a fully paid ticket.

fraud.truth: Truth: misleading or forged documents are the problem. A transparent temporary reservation is different.

sample.title: A clean PDF built for visa files
sample.text: Your reservation is formatted so the important details are easy to scan: passenger name, route, dates, flight number, airline, and booking reference.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.text: Answers to the questions travelers usually ask before buying a temporary reservation.

what.question: What is a dummy ticket?
what.answer: It is a temporary flight reservation with passenger and route details, usually used as proof of travel for visa applications or onward travel.

legal.question: Is a dummy ticket legal?
legal.answer: A real temporary reservation is commonly used for travel documentation. It is not a paid ticket and should not be used as a boarding pass.

valid.question: How long is it valid?
valid.answer: Validity depends on the reservation and route. The document is intended for short-term documentation windows.

verify.question: Can I verify the PNR?
verify.answer: Yes. A verifiable reservation includes a booking reference that can be checked through the relevant airline system.

accept.question: Which countries accept it?
accept.answer: Travelers use reservations for Schengen, UK, US, UAE, Canada, and many other visa or onward-travel situations.

refund.question: What if my visa is rejected?
refund.answer: The reservation supports your documentation file, but visa approval is decided by the embassy or authority reviewing your application.

finalCta.title: Your visa appointment is close. Your ticket can be ready fast.
finalCta.text: Create a clean, verifiable reservation PDF for visa files, onward travel proof, and travel documentation.

footer.description: Clean, verifiable flight reservations for visa applications, onward travel proof, and travel documentation.
footer.disclaimer: InstaDummyTicket provides verifiable temporary flight reservations and hotel bookings for visa applications and proof of onward travel only. These are not confirmed paid air tickets and cannot be used for actual boarding.
